name: San Fruttuoso
blurb: Ferry-only from Camogli pier (Line 1, ~25 min): there is no road to San Fruttuoso, so driveTimeMin is 0 by convention. The Doria-dynasty Benedictine abbey above the cove costs 7-9 EUR to enter, and the Christ of the Abysses bronze is 15 m below for snorkelers. Morning ferry, abbey, swim, cove bar-restaurant lunch, and afternoon ferry back is the complete day.
